sentences.target: Ils parlent d'un meurtre aux infos.

translations.fr: Ils parlent d'un meurtre aux infos.
translations.en: They are talking about a murder on the news.
translations.es: Están hablando de un asesinato en las noticias.
translations.de: In den Nachrichten sprechen sie über einen Mord.
translations.it: Al telegiornale parlano di un omicidio.
translations.ko: 뉴스에서 살인 사건에 대해 이야기하고 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 他们在新闻里谈论一起谋杀案。
translations.yue: 佢哋喺新聞度講緊一宗謀殺案。
translations.pt: Estão falando sobre um assassinato no noticiário.
translations.vi: Họ đang nói về một vụ giết người trên bản tin.
translations.ar: يتحدثون عن جريمة قتل في الأخبار.
translations.nl: Op het nieuws praten ze over een moord.
translations.hi: खबरों में एक हत्या के बारे में बात हो रही है.
translations.el: Στις ειδήσεις μιλάνε για έναν φόνο.
translations.nb: De snakker om et drap på nyhetene.
translations.id: Di berita mereka membicarakan sebuah pembunuhan.
translations.sv: De pratar om ett mord på nyheterna.
translations.ro: La știri se vorbește despre o crimă.
translations.da: De taler om et mord i nyhederne.
translations.ja: ニュースで殺人事件について話している。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 3rd person plural; grammatical subject of the verb.
Main verb, present indicative, 3rd person plural; denotes the ongoing action.
Preposition ‘de’ elided before a vowel; introduces the complement indicating topic/content.
Indefinite article, masculine singular; determiner of ‘meurtre’.
Common noun, masculine; object of the preposition ‘de’, complement to the verb via the PP.
Contraction of ‘à’ + ‘les’; introduces a locative prepositional phrase.
Common noun, plural (colloquial for ‘informations’); object of ‘aux’, specifies location/context.

sentences.target: Je regarde un film sur un meurtre.
sentences.reading: /ʒə ʁəɡaʁd œ̃ film syʁ œ̃ mœʁtʁ/

translations.fr: Je regarde un film sur un meurtre.
translations.ipa: /ʒə ʁəɡaʁd œ̃ film syʁ œ̃ mœʁtʁ/
translations.en: I’m watching a movie about a murder.
translations.es: Estoy viendo una película sobre un asesinato.
translations.de: Ich sehe mir einen Film über einen Mord an.
translations.it: Sto guardando un film su un omicidio.
translations.zh-Hans: 我在看一部关于谋杀的电影。
translations.yue: 我而家睇緊一套關於謀殺嘅電影。
translations.pt: Estou assistindo a um filme sobre um assassinato.
translations.tr: Bir cinayetle ilgili bir film izliyorum.
translations.vi: Tôi đang xem một bộ phim về một vụ giết người.
translations.ar: أنا أشاهد فيلمًا عن جريمة قتل.
translations.nl: Ik kijk een film over een moord.
translations.hi: मैं एक हत्या पर आधारित फिल्म देख रहा हूँ.
translations.el: Βλέπω μια ταινία για έναν φόνο.
translations.nb: Jeg ser en film om et drap.
translations.id: Saya sedang menonton film tentang sebuah pembunuhan.
translations.sv: Jag tittar på en film om ett mord.
translations.ro: Mă uit la un film despre o crimă.
translations.cs: Dívám se na film o vraždě.
translations.da: Jeg ser en film om et mord.
translations.ja: 殺人事件についての映画を見ている。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 1st person singular; grammatical subject of the verb.
Main verb, present indicative, 1st person singular; denotes the action performed by the subject.
Indefinite article, masculine singular; determiner of ‘film’.
Common noun, masculine; direct object of the verb ‘regarde’.
Preposition; introduces a PP modifying ‘film’ to indicate subject matter.
Indefinite article, masculine singular; determiner of ‘meurtre’.
Common noun, masculine; object of the preposition ‘sur’, specifying the film’s topic.

sentences.target: On discute d'un meurtre au café.

translations.fr: On discute d'un meurtre au café.
translations.en: We’re discussing a murder at the café.
translations.es: Estamos hablando de un asesinato en la cafetería.
translations.de: Im Café sprechen wir über einen Mord.
translations.it: Al bar stiamo parlando di un omicidio.
translations.ko: 카페에서 살인 사건에 대해 이야기하고 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们在咖啡馆讨论一起谋杀案。
translations.yue: 我哋喺咖啡店度傾緊一宗謀殺案。
translations.pt: No café estamos falando sobre um assassinato.
translations.he: בבית הקפה אנחנו מדברים על רצח.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đang bàn về một vụ giết người ở quán cà phê.
translations.nl: In het café bespreken we een moord.
translations.hi: हम कैफ़े में एक हत्या के बारे में बात कर रहे हैं.
translations.el: Στο καφέ συζητάμε για έναν φόνο.
translations.nb: På kafeen snakker vi om ett drap.
translations.id: Di kafe kami sedang membahas sebuah pembunuhan.
translations.sv: På kaféet pratar vi om ett mord.
translations.ro: La cafenea discutăm despre o crimă.
translations.da: På caféen taler vi om et mord.
translations.ja: カフェで殺人事件について話している。

tokens.explanation: Impersonal/colloquial subject pronoun often meaning ‘we’; grammatical subject of the verb.
Main verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular (with ‘on’); denotes the action.
Preposition ‘de’ elided before a vowel; introduces the discussion topic.
Indefinite article, masculine singular; determiner of ‘meurtre’.
Common noun, masculine; object of the preposition ‘de’, complement to ‘discute’.
Contraction of ‘à’ + ‘le’; introduces a locative prepositional phrase.
Common noun, masculine; object of ‘au’, specifying the location of the discussion.

sentences.target: Elle écrit sur un meurtre dans son roman.
sentences.reading: /ɛl ekʁi syʁ œ̃ mœʁtʁ dɑ̃ sɔ̃ ʁɔmɑ̃/

translations.fr: Elle écrit sur un meurtre dans son roman.
translations.ipa: /ɛl ekʁi syʁ œ̃ mœʁtʁ dɑ̃ sɔ̃ ʁɔmɑ̃/
translations.en: She writes about a murder in her novel.
translations.es: Ella escribe sobre un asesinato en su novela.
translations.de: Sie schreibt in ihrem Roman über einen Mord.
translations.it: Scrive di un omicidio nel suo romanzo.
translations.ko: 그녀는 소설에서 살인 사건에 대해 쓰고 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 她在小说中描写一桩谋杀案。
translations.yue: 佢喺佢本小說入面寫一宗謀殺案。
translations.ru: В своем романе она пишет об убийстве.
translations.pt: Ela escreve sobre um assassinato em seu romance.
translations.he: היא כותבת על רצח ברומן שלה.
translations.vi: Cô ấy viết về một vụ giết người trong tiểu thuyết của mình.
translations.ar: هي تكتب عن جريمة قتل في روايتها.
translations.nl: Ze schrijft in haar roman over een moord.
translations.uk: У своєму романі вона пише про вбивство.
translations.hi: वह अपने उपन्यास में एक हत्या के बारे में लिखती है.
translations.pl: W swojej powieści pisze o morderstwie.
translations.el: Στο μυθιστόρημά της γράφει για έναν φόνο.
translations.nb: I romanen sin skriver hun om et drap.
translations.id: Dalam novelnya dia menulis tentang sebuah pembunuhan.
translations.sv: I sin roman skriver hon om ett mord.
translations.ro: În romanul ei scrie despre o crimă.
translations.cs: Ve svém románu píše o vraždě.
translations.da: I sin roman skriver hun om et mord.
translations.ja: 彼女は小説で殺人事件について書いている。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 3rd person singular feminine; grammatical subject of the verb.
Main verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; denotes the writing action.
Preposition; introduces the topic PP (‘sur un meurtre’) governed by ‘écrit’.
Indefinite article, masculine singular; determiner of ‘meurtre’.
Common noun, masculine; object of the preposition ‘sur’, indicating the topic.
Preposition; introduces a PP giving the medium/context (‘dans son roman’).
Possessive determiner, 3rd person singular; agrees with ‘roman’ (masc. sg.), marks possession.
Common noun, masculine; object of ‘dans’, indicating the medium where the writing appears.
